strategy: Low-Health Moon boss at 2,500. Hit Fire or Myth, since it takes +25 from both.
Every Round it marks a Wizard and copies that Wizard's next spell back onto them. While marked, cast blades and heals, which copy harmlessly.
Do not cast an attack you cannot survive while marked. A damage spell you cast gets mirrored onto the marked Wizard.
Do not pass or Reshuffle while marked. That triggers a set punishment spell instead.
Stack blades, then land one Fire or Myth hit. At 2,500 Health it drops in a single blow even if the mirror hits you back.
cheatNotes: Every Round it marks a random Wizard with a Stun Block. That marked Wizard is who it copies.
Only one mark exists at a time. A new mark cancels the old one.
The same Wizard can hold the mark several Rounds running, so do not assume it rotates.
Whatever spell the marked Wizard casts, the Mimic re-casts on that same Wizard. If you are marked, cast something you can survive, or a heal or blade.
If the marked Wizard passes or Reshuffles, the Mimic instead fires a set spell based on which Wizard was marked.
